description: Master table for all location hierarchy data, normalized to avoid redundancy.
Population breakdown by key age groups (starting with 0-6).
Population categorized as Scheduled Caste or Scheduled Tribe.
Main workers engaged in agriculture, livestock, forestry, fishing, mining, and quarrying (Primary Sector).
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_WORKERS_PRIMARY_SECTOR CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_WORKERS_PRIMARY_SECTOR (
	WORKERS_PRIMARY_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	HIERARCHY_ID BIGINT,
	CENSUS_YEAR INTEGER,
	MALE_MAIN_WORKERS_CULTIVATORS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_CULTIVATORS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_MAIN_WORKERS_AGRICULTURAL_LABOURERS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_AGRICULTURAL_LABOURERS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_MAIN_WORKERS_LIVESTOCK_FORESTRY_FISHING DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_LIVESTOCK_FORESTRY_FISHING DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_MAIN_WORKERS_MINING_QUARRYING DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_MINING_QUARRYING DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Main workers in manufacturing and construction (Secondary Sector).

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_WORKERS_SECONDARY_SECTOR CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_WORKERS_SECONDARY_SECTOR (
	WORKERS_SECONDARY_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	HIERARCHY_ID BIGINT,
	CENSUS_YEAR INTEGER,
	MALE_MAIN_WORKERS_MANUFACTURING_HOUSEHOLD DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_MANUFACTURING_HOUSEHOLD DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_MAIN_WORKERS_MANUFACTURING_OTHER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_MAIN_WORKERS_MANUFACTURING_OTHER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_CONSTRUCTION_WORKERS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_CONSTRUCTION_WORKERS DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Main workers in trade/commerce, transport/storage/communication, and other services (Tertiary Sector).

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_WORKERS_TERTIARY_SECTOR CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_WORKERS_TERTIARY_SECTOR (
	WORKERS_TERTIARY_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,

	MALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_WORKERS_TRANSPORT_STORAGE_COMMUNICATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_WORKERS_TRANSPORT_STORAGE_COMMUNICATION DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MALE_WORKERS_OTHER_SERVICES DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FEMALE_WORKERS_OTHER_SERVICES DOUBLE PRECISION
);
